glosses.en: see someone home; see someone out
glosses.es: acompañar de vuelta; acompañar a casa
glosses.pt: acompanhar de volta; acompanhar até em casa
glosses.tr: geri eşlik etmek; eve kadar götürmek
glosses.pl: odprowadzić z powrotem; odprowadzić do domu
glosses.ro: a însoți înapoi; a conduce acasă
glosses.ja: 送り届ける; 家まで送る

translations.en: I'll walk you to the stop.
translations.de: Ich bringe dich bis zur Haltestelle.
translations.pt: Eu te acompanho até o ponto.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ đưa bạn ra trạm xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ik breng je naar de halte.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें स्टॉप तक छोड़ दूंगा.
translations.el: Θα σε συνοδεύσω μέχρι τη στάση.
translations.da: Jeg følger dig hen til stoppestedet.
translations.ja: バス停まで送っていくよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; the speaker is the subject.
Unstressed clitic object pronoun (2nd person singular), direct object of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; means ‘to accompany/see someone back (home).’
Preposition ‘jusque’ elided before a vowel; forms the compound preposition ‘jusqu’à’ expressing a limit.
Preposition completing ‘jusqu’ to form ‘jusqu’à’, indicating the endpoint.
Definite article elided before a vowel; agrees with the following noun.
Common noun meaning ‘stop’ (e.g., bus stop); object of the prepositional phrase.

translations.pt: Nós vamos acompanhá-la até em casa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ đưa cô ấy về nhà.
translations.hi: हम उसे घर तक छोड़ देंगे.
translations.el: Θα τη συνοδεύσουμε στο σπίτι της.
translations.ja: 私たちは彼女を家まで送っていく。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; here functions as ‘we’ (3rd person singular agreement).
Clitic direct object pronoun (3rd person feminine singular); marks the person being taken back.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (with ‘on’); action of escorting someone back.
Preposition indicating someone’s place/home.
Disjunctive/stressed pronoun used after ‘chez’; indicates whose place (‘her place’).

sentences.target: Je veux vous raccompagner après la fête.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø vu ʁakɔ̃paɲe apʁɛ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Je veux vous raccompagner après la fête.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø vu ʁakɔ̃paɲe apʁɛ la fɛt/
translations.en: I want to walk you home after the party.
translations.es: Quiero acompañarte a casa después de la fiesta.
translations.de: Ich möchte dich nach der Party nach Hause begleiten.
translations.it: Voglio accompagnarti a casa dopo la festa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想在聚会结束后送你回家。
translations.yue: 我想喺派對之後送你返屋企。
translations.ru: Я хочу проводить тебя домой после вечеринки.
translations.pt: Quero acompanhar você até em casa depois da festa.
translations.he: אני רוצה ללוות אותך הביתה אחרי המסיבה.
translations.tr: Partiden sonra seni eve kadar geçirmek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đưa bạn về nhà sau bữa tiệc.
translations.ar: أريد أن أرافقك إلى البيت بعد الحفلة.
translations.nl: Ik wil je na het feest naar huis brengen.
translations.uk: Я хочу провести тебе додому після вечірки.
translations.hi: मैं पार्टी के बाद तुम्हें घर तक छोड़ना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę odprowadzić cię do domu po imprezie.
translations.el: Θέλω να σε συνοδεύσω στο σπίτι μετά το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Jeg vil følge deg hjem etter festen.
translations.id: Aku ingin mengantarmu pulang setelah pesta.
translations.sv: Jag vill följa dig hem efter festen.
translations.ro: Vreau să te conduc acasă după petrecere.
translations.cs: Chci tě doprovodit domů po večírku.
translations.da: Jeg vil følge dig hjem efter festen.
translations.fi: Haluan saattaa sinut kotiin juhlan jälkeen.
translations.ja: パーティーの後、家まで送っていきたい。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main/semiauxiliary verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Clitic object pronoun (2nd person plural or polite singular), direct or indirect object of the infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement of ‘veux’; denotes the action of accompanying someone back.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article (feminine singular) agreeing with ‘fête’.
Common noun meaning ‘party/celebration’; object of the preposition ‘après’.

translations.es: Esta noche acompañas a Clara a casa.
translations.de: Du bringst Clara heute Abend nach Hause.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 클라라를 집까지 바래다줄 거야.
translations.yue: 今晚你送克拉拉返屋企。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером ты проводишь Клару домой.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite você vai acompanhar a Clara até em casa.
translations.he: הלילה אתה מלווה את קלרה הביתה.
translations.tr: Bu akşam Clara'yı eve kadar götüreceksin.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn sẽ đưa Clara về nhà.
translations.nl: Vanavond breng je Clara naar huis.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ти проведеш Клару додому.
translations.hi: आज रात तुम क्लारा को घर तक छोड़ोगे.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem odprowadzisz Klarę do domu.
translations.el: Απόψε θα συνοδεύσεις την Κλάρα στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: I kveld følger du Clara hjem.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu akan mengantar Clara pulang.
translations.sv: I kväll följer du Clara hem.
translations.ro: Diseară o conduci pe Clara acasă.
translations.da: I aften følger du Clara hjem.
translations.ja: 今夜は君がクララを家まで送っていく。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; action of escorting someone back.
Proper noun, the person being escorted; direct object of the verb.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘soir’ in the time expression.
Common noun; with ‘ce’ forms a temporal adverbial meaning ‘this evening/tonight’.
